text: Wandering through this dimly lit, quiet hallway, I find myself pondering the nature of emptiness—both physical and metaphorical. The darkness and stillness evoke a sense of solitude, tinged with a mild unease, as if I have been left alone with my own thoughts in the aftermath of daily commotion. There is a strange comfort here, knowing that the world outside is bustling while I linger in a space reserved for pause and reflection.
